scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @taptu/shared && npm run build --workspace @taptu/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @taptu/shared && npm run build --workspace @taptu/web
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace @taptu/shared && npm run build --workspace @taptu/api && npm run build --workspace @taptu/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @taptu/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @taptu/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @taptu/web
